verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Glorious and resplendent God Who decorates the stars above We lift You Higher for we know who You are Sovereign and exalted One Beside You there is no none one We lift You higher for we know who You are

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You’re our God and You reign You're our God and we bless Your name We are here to boast of who You are You’re Our God and You reign You’re our God and we bless Your name We delight in who You are

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Boundless and unfailing God Who wraps us in his arms of love We lift You higher for we know who You are Creator of all the eyes can see The mountains and the raging seas We lift You higher for we know who You are

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We honor and adore You We reverence You O God We bless and give thanks for You We joy in who You are
